title: Way Beyond The Milk
description: A Cosmic Horizons addon: New storms, oxygen, survival friendly additions and more!
body:
_Cosmic Horizons is absolutely REQUIRED for the addon to work: [Download Cosmic Horizons Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmic-horizons-cosmos/)_

**This Cosmic Horizon datapack adds a basic oxygen system (wear a helment to breath in space), storms to each planet (almost every planet has its own storm), a crafting recipe for the Space Nodule (survival friendly), new world generation to planets, and way more additions.**

( ! ) The Nether and the End are glitched and not intended to be entered when playing with this addon ( ! )
